description: Multifragment of at least two different texts that are fused together. The lower fragment on the verso retains an inverted Arabic-script text that is probably documentary. It is possible the ink was transferred from the original document while drying or that the text is now only visible through the back of the paper. Requires further examination.
description_he: חמרה רב-קטעית של לפחות שני טקסטים מחוברים; הקטע התחתון בגב שומר טקסט ערבי הפוך, כנראה תיעודי
